=== Refactor Application Results ===

=== [R1] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/makeSchemaOpaque.ts ---
// refactor: 4:14-4:22
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export const pipe(MyStruct) = Schema.Struct({
  id: Schema.Number,
  name: Schema.String
})


=== [R1] Refactor 1: "Toggle type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/makeSchemaOpaque.ts ---
// refactor: 4:14-4:22
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export const MyStruct: Schema.Struct<{ readonly id: Schema.Number; readonly name: Schema.String; }> = Schema.Struct({
  id: Schema.Number,
  name: Schema.String
})


=== [R1] Refactor 2: "Toggle lazy const" ===

--- file:///.src/makeSchemaOpaque.ts ---
// refactor: 4:14-4:22
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export const MyStruct = () => Schema.Struct({
  id: Schema.Number,
  name: Schema.String
})


=== [R1] Refactor 3: "Make Schema opaque" ===

--- file:///.src/makeSchemaOpaque.ts ---
// refactor: 4:14-4:22
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export const MyStruct_ = Schema.Struct({
  id: Schema.Number,
  name: Schema.String
})
export interface MyStruct extends Schema.Schema.Type<typeof MyStruct_> { }
export interface MyStructEncoded extends Schema.Codec.Encoded<typeof MyStruct_> { }
export type MyStructDecodingServices = Schema.Codec.DecodingServices<typeof MyStruct_>;
export type MyStructEncodingServices = Schema.Codec.EncodingServices<typeof MyStruct_>;
export const MyStruct: Schema.Codec<MyStruct, MyStructEncoded, MyStructDecodingServices, MyStructEncodingServices> = MyStruct_;


=== [R1] Refactor 4: "Make Schema opaque with namespace" ===

--- file:///.src/makeSchemaOpaque.ts ---
// refactor: 4:14-4:22
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export const MyStruct_ = Schema.Struct({
  id: Schema.Number,
  name: Schema.String
})
export interface MyStruct extends Schema.Schema.Type<typeof MyStruct_> { }
export namespace MyStruct {
    export interface Encoded extends Schema.Codec.Encoded<typeof MyStruct_> { }
    export type DecodingServices = Schema.Codec.DecodingServices<typeof MyStruct_>;
    export type EncodingServices = Schema.Codec.EncodingServices<typeof MyStruct_>;
}
export const MyStruct: Schema.Schema<MyStruct, MyStruct.Encoded, MyStruct.DecodingServices> = MyStruct_;
